_comment: Optional Layer-2 study-name map for stat-check / claims-audit. Copy to studies.json and edit. Key = 'notebook.ipynb::span_start' (empty string when span_start is null in results.json). When studies.json exists, runs with unknown keys are SKIPPED (curated mode -- keeps probe/scratch runs out); without it, every run is auto-named '<notebook-stem>@<span>'.
